center.name: Neotropical Bird Club
center.summary: Neotropical Bird Club是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括飘带尾霸鹟，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: | last2=Rumboll |first2=Maurice| title =Birds of Southern South America and Antarctica | publisher =Princeton University Press | series =Princeton Illustrated Checklists | date =2001 | location =New Jersey | pages =Plate 77, map 77.14 | isbn =0-691-09035-1 }} It has also been documented as a vagrant in Uruguay. The streamer-tailed tyrant inhabits wet grasslands and marshy areas with nearby streams and shrubby areas, and also groves of moriche palm
